comments.author: @lawrencewitt7548
comments.text:
As a man in my 60's l have always had a curiosity about Argentina and all the fascinating and diverse landscapes and ocean shores.  But truthfully, the endless ads trying to sell me beauty products, full bodied shampoos and conditioners, skin softeners and nail polishes - over and over and over -  went from making me annoyed to outright angry 😡!  
Enough is enough already 🤬

comments.author: @scottmatt6169
comments.text: I’ve been living in western Alaska for 40years. Decided to go look at Argentina and maybe get citizenship. Did some volunteer work around Buenos Aires and then went to Mendoza and Bariloche. Other than the Middle East I have never experienced a more racist people towards white Americans.  The hated especially in Bariloche made the local people seem miserable. My view of Argentina and its people is forever changed.
